notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-294 — thanks for testing! FIX THIS BUILD — the 🕵️ 'Who's actually buying?' buttons were landing on empty pages (the shareholder-registry page they pointed to has been retired by its publisher, and Yahoo's holder pages don't exist for ASX tickers). 👥 'Top shareholders & insiders' now opens a targeted search that reliably lands on the full ownership picture — top holders with percentages plus director buys/sells; 🧑‍💼 'Director filings (3Y)' opens the official ASX filings page; and the fine print names the exact notices to look for. NOTE: made-up practice tickers will never match live pages — please test the buttons on a real code (WTC, BHP, etc.) and tell me if any button still lands somewhere useless. Feedback via ✉ top-left.
